data.body:
## Description

Write failing tests verifying the 5 anti-cover-up patterns exist in both deprecated fix-task templates. Create a new test file or extend the existing test_fix_task_prompts_retired.py.

**Target files to test:**
- plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/prompts/fix-task-tdd.md (Anti-Patterns table)
- plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/prompts/fix-task-mechanical.md (Anti-Patterns table)

**5 patterns to verify:** (1) skipping/removing tests, (2) loosening assertions, (3) broad exception handlers, (4) downgrading error severity, (5) commenting out failing code. Each must have a 'Do this instead' alternative.

Tests are structural (metadata/schema validation for prompt templates — acceptable per TDD rules).

**RED markers**: Add .test-index entries with RED markers for the new test class.

### Files to modify
- CREATE or MODIFY: tests/skills/test_deprecated_fix_task_anti_coverup.py
- MODIFY: .test-index

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists with at least 5 test methods per template (10 total)
  Verify: grep -c 'def test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test_deprecated_fix_task_anti_coverup.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 10)}'
- [ ] .test-index entries exist for both deprecated templates
  Verify: grep -q 'fix-task-tdd' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index && grep -q 'fix-task-mechanical' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] All new tests FAIL (RED)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python -m pytest tests/skills/test_deprecated_fix_task_anti_coverup.py --tb=no -q 2>&1 | grep -q 'failed'
